consentBanner.title: Cookies & Advertising
consentBanner.bodyIntro: We use technically necessary cookies to provide this site. With your consent, we also use Google AdSense to fund the app - this may involve processing personal data (e.g. your IP address). Learn more in our

urlInput.label: Link to YouTube, Facebook, Instagram or TikTok
urlInput.formatError: Please enter a valid link from YouTube, Facebook, Instagram or TikTok.

error.NETWORK_ERROR: Server unreachable. Please check your internet connection and try again.
error.UNKNOWN_ERROR: Something went wrong. Please try again.

tool.headline: Download video
tool.tagline: Paste a link from YouTube, Facebook, Instagram or TikTok.

website.headline: Reelio
website.tagline: Download videos from YouTube, Facebook, Instagram and TikTok - as a desktop app.

explainer.body: Reelio downloads video and audio straight to your own computer - fast, private, and without waiting on overloaded servers. Just paste a link, pick a format, done.

help.title: Help opening the app for the first time
help.macos: macOS shows a warning the first time you open the app, since it isn't certified by Apple yet. Here's how: System Settings → Privacy & Security → scroll down → click "Open Anyway".
help.windows: Windows SmartScreen shows a warning the first time you run the app because it doesn't have an official certificate yet. Click "More info" and then "Run anyway".
help.linux: The AppImage file needs to be made executable after downloading: right-click → Properties → Allow executing (or in a terminal: chmod +x reelio-linux.AppImage), then double-click to launch.
